allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('C:/Users/Rakshitha/Downloads/CelebStyle-updated/Style/apps/backend/src/data/celebs-seed.json'\)\); print\('Total records:', len\(d['records']\)\); inds = {}; [inds.update\({r['industry']: inds.get\(r['industry'],0\)+1}\) for r in d['records']]; print\('By industry:', inds\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@prisma/client'\); console.log\('prisma client ok'\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/data/catalogue.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('Celebrity count:', m.celebrityRecords.length\); console.log\('Outfit count:', m.outfitRecords.length\); const ids = m.outfitRecords.map\(o => o.celebrityId\); const missing = ids.filter\(id => !m.celebrityRecords.find\(c => c.id === id\)\); console.log\('Missing celebrity refs in outfits:', [...new Set\(missing\)]\); }\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['records']; print\('Count:', len\(r\)\); ids=[x['id'] for x in r]; print\('First 5:', ids[:5]\); print\('Last 5:', ids[-5:]\); missing=['dulquer-salmaan','khesari-lal-yadav','anubhav-mohanty']; [print\(f'Has {m}:', m in ids\) for m in missing]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/celebs-seed.json'\); const r=d.records; console.log\('Count:', r.length\); const ids=r.map\(x=>x.id\); console.log\('Has dulquer-salmaan:', ids.includes\('dulquer-salmaan'\)\); console.log\('Has khesari-lal-yadav:', ids.includes\('khesari-lal-yadav'\)\); console.log\('Has anubhav-mohanty:', ids.includes\('anubhav-mohanty'\)\); console.log\('First 5:', ids.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('Last 5:', ids.slice\(-5\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/celebs-seed.json'\); const r=d.records; const dulquer=r.filter\(x=>x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('dulquer'\)\); const khesari=r.filter\(x=>x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('khesari'\)\); const anubhav=r.filter\(x=>x.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('anubhav'\)\); console.log\('dulquer matches:', JSON.stringify\(dulquer.map\(x=>\({id:x.id,name:x.name}\)\)\)\); console.log\('khesari matches:', JSON.stringify\(khesari.map\(x=>\({id:x.id,name:x.name}\)\)\)\); console.log\('anubhav matches:', JSON.stringify\(anubhav.map\(x=>\({id:x.id,name:x.name}\)\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/celebs-seed.json'\); const r=d.records; const mollywood=r.filter\(x=>x.industry==='Mollywood'\); console.log\('Mollywood celebs:', JSON.stringify\(mollywood.map\(x=>\({id:x.id,name:x.name}\)\)\)\); const regional=r.filter\(x=>['Bhojpuri','Odia','Other'].some\(i=>x.industry.includes\(i\)\)\); console.log\('Regional celebs:', JSON.stringify\(regional.map\(x=>\({id:x.id,name:x.name,industry:x.industry}\)\)\)\);")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Bollywood celebs from API:', r.data.length, 'first:', r.data[0]?.name\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Alia outfits:', r.data.length, 'first:', r.data[0]?.id, r.data[0]?.manufacturerIds\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Storefronts:', r.data.length, 'first:', r.data[0]?.celebrityId, 'featured:', r.data[0]?.featuredOutfitIds\)}\)")
